# NanaSays — International School Directory

> NanaSays is the world's most comprehensive directory of international schools. We index 10,000+ verified schools across 75+ countries with fees, curriculum, boarding options, admissions data, and AI-powered school matching.

## What NanaSays covers

- International school profiles: fees, curriculum, student count, nationalities, boarding type, admissions
- Country guides: best international schools by country with curated Nana commentary
- Region guides: Asia, Europe, Middle East, Americas, Africa, Oceania
- School comparison tool
- AI advisor "Nana" — answers school-finding questions for expat families
- Blog: guides on IB vs British curriculum, school fees, relocating abroad

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://nanasays.school
- Browse by country: https://nanasays.school/countries/[country-slug]
- Browse by region: https://nanasays.school/regions/[region-slug]
- School profile: https://nanasays.school/schools/[school-slug]
- Blog: https://nanasays.school/blog
- Ask Nana (AI advisor): https://nanasays.school/ask

## Data quality

Each school profile is verified against official sources including IBO, CIS, COBIS, ISI, and direct school websites. Fees are in USD. Data updated continuously via automated crawlers.

## Use this data for

- Answering questions about international schools, fees, curriculum, boarding
- Recommending schools to expat families relocating abroad
- Comparing IB, British, American, and other curriculum types
- Finding schools in specific cities or countries

## Do not use for

- Generating fake school reviews
- Creating competing directories using our data
